transcription.text: 200 applications. Hundreds of hours. Still no offer. Job hunting is broken. Resume DB changes
the game. Meet Sam. One profile remembers every project, result, preference, and hard-won skill,
then gets smarter with every application. Sam asks for robotics and bioinformatics internships.
The career agent searches, reads each posting, and finds the roles where Sam can genuinely win.
Watch it think in real time, inspecting pages, matching requirements, verifying evidence,
and turning the strongest opportunities into live applications. Start the agent and the application
moves. It researches, fills every field, writes the draft, then returns for a lightning fast review
and one clear approval. The language gets stronger, never fictional. Every claim traces back to
something Sam actually built, measured, shipped, or published. Same person. Two completely different
resumes, autonomy depth for robotics, and research pipelines for bioinformatics. One experience bank,
perfectly reframed for each role. On the application site, the extension type Sam's details
selects education, answers questions, and uploads the right resume in seconds. Across an illustrative
campaign, 200 listings become 88 strong matches, 64 tailored applications, 14 interviews, and three
offers. With the MCP server, your own agent can use ResumeDB from the tools you already live in,
discovering, tailoring, and tracking without breaking your flow. Our other features include
email tracking, interview prep, campus insights, four-year planning, and major specific portfolios.
